sections.paragraph:
verb לדרוך

to tread, step; trample

verb לדרוך

to cock (gun) ; draw (bow) ; press (grapes)

verb להידרך

be trodden, trampled; cocked; tense, taut

verb להדריך

to guide, direct, instruct, lead; interrupt

verb הודרך

be guided, directed, instructed, led, coached

preposition

through, by, via; by way of

masculine and feminine noun

way, route, path, road, highway, highroad, street, avenue; direction; passage, approach; manner, fashion, mode, modus, wise, sort; custom
